summary: Iteration 18 testing complete. All 12 feature scenarios verified for Bloom PWA new feature batch. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: all feature tests passed with one bug found and fixed (ProfilePage gallery photo display). Direct messaging startChatWith, password validation, email verification, media upload, gallery tab, emoji picker, admin nav - all working correctly.

minor.issue: No password complexity validation on backend - only frontend validates. Direct API call can register user with weak password 'test123'. Password validation is frontend-only (AuthPage.js validatePassword()). Recommend adding Pydantic validator on UserCreate.password field.
Test requirement says 'POST' but actual implementation is GET. This is correct/consistent - both backend and VerifyEmailPage.jsx use GET. No fix needed, but test requirement wording is incorrect.

ui_bugs.issue: Gallery photos used p.data for img src, but GET /api/users/{user_id}/photos returns {id, content_type, tags, created_at} without 'data' field. Photos would show broken/empty images.
ui_bugs.status: FIXED - Changed to use /api/photos/${p.id} URL (same approach as UserProfilePage.js)

feature_test_results.direct_messaging_startChatWith: PASS - Navigating from UserProfilePage 'Napsat zprávu' button uses location.state.startChatWith and MessagesPage auto-opens the conversation with message input visible
feature_test_results.verify_email_invalid_token: PASS - GET /api/auth/verify-email/invalid-token returns 400 with 'Neplatný nebo expirovaný ověřovací odkaz'
feature_test_results.verify_email_fake_uuid: PASS - Fake UUID token also returns 400
feature_test_results.resend_verification_already_verified: PASS - Returns 200 with 'E-mail je již ověřen'
feature_test_results.upload_media_invalid_type: PASS - Returns 400 for text/plain and PDF files
feature_test_results.verify_email_page_error_state: PASS - /verify-email?token=test shows 'Ověření selhalo' with 'Neplatný nebo expirovaný ověřovací odkaz'
feature_test_results.auth_password_min_8_chars: PASS - Password field placeholder shows 'Minimálně 8 znaků', browser shows 8-char minimum HTML5 validation
feature_test_results.auth_pwa_install_section: PASS - Details/summary element with '📱 Jak dostat aplikaci Bloom do svého zařízení' visible below auth card
feature_test_results.profile_gallery_tab: PASS - 'Galerie' tab visible in ProfilePage with privacy settings, photo upload button (enabled for verified user)
feature_test_results.messages_emoji_picker: PASS - Emoji picker button opens grid of 60 emojis, clicking inserts emoji into message input
feature_test_results.messages_image_upload_btn: PASS - [data-testid='image-upload-btn'] visible in message input area
feature_test_results.messages_video_upload_btn: PASS - [data-testid='video-upload-btn'] visible in message input area
feature_test_results.verification_banner_verified_user: PASS - No banner shown for admin user with email_verified=true
feature_test_results.chat_profile_link_navigation: PASS - Clicking username in chat header navigates to /users/:id
feature_test_results.all_main_pages_accessible: PASS - Home, Support, News, Profile all load without errors

action_items: LOW: Add password complexity validation to UserCreate Pydantic model in server.py backend to enforce 8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special char (currently frontend-only)
INFO: Verify email endpoint is GET (not POST as implied in test requirement - this is correct, no change needed)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: ProfilePage.js gallery photos used `p.data` for img src but GET /api/users/{user_id}/photos does not return 'data' field in projection (only returns id, content_type, tags, created_at). Fixed to use /api/photos/${p.id} URL to serve photos (consistent with UserProfilePage.js approach).
SECURITY: Backend /api/auth/register has no password complexity validation. UserCreate Pydantic model accepts any string for password. Frontend validatePassword() can be bypassed via direct API call.

NOTE: Location.state approach for startChatWith (React Router state) works correctly but only when navigating programmatically via navigate(). Direct URL access with ?startChatWith=userId query param would NOT work - that would require useSearchParams(). Current use cases (from UserProfilePage) use navigate() with state so it works as designed.
CODE QUALITY: Both MessagesPage.js and UserProfilePage.js have data-testid='send-message-btn' - same testid on different pages. Not a bug but potentially confusing for future tests.
server.py is 2190 lines - well above the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into multiple route modules.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. 2 test users were registered during backend testing (TEST_ prefix emails): test with weak password (test123) and strong password (Test@1234).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 all features pass. Key: (1) ProfilePage.js gallery photos fixed to use /api/photos/{p.id} URL. (2) Backend has no password validation - only frontend. (3) startChatWith uses location.state (React Router) not URL query params. (4) Admin user test1@bloom.cz has email_verified=true so no verification banner. (5) Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_bloom_iteration18.py covers: verify-email (GET endpoint), resend-verification, media upload (invalid type/oversized/valid), gallery endpoints, registration, direct messages API. All 16 tests passing.
